author: draganrakita
content:
It is slightly different that we talked about. Order is something like:

* Gas costs (memory expansion, base opcode cost, warm value cost, value transfer cost): Without cold check cost.
* call stack depth limit not exceeded and sender balance sufficiency: failure on any skips later steps and only previous gas is consumed.
* Gas cost ( cold cost, account creation cost, warm/cold cost for eip7702 delegation). Warming and BAL insertion.

author: draganrakita
content: This is most optimal flow of checks that removes both target and delegation from BAL (if there is no balance), and dont introduce edge cases on warm/cold access.
